sections.paragraph:
Original: לה לוא לא

Transliteration: lô' lô' lôh

Phonetic: lo

BDB Definition:

  1. not, no
    1. not (with verb - absolute prohibition)
    2. not (with modifier - negation)
    3. nothing (substantive)
    4. without (with particle)
    5. before (of time)

Origin: a primitive particle

TWOT entry: 1064

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
